SS2_WARDEN_DESCRIPTION: The future of law enforcement. Warden est
SS2_WARDEN_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abiit, ad ipsam spei medullam percussus.
SS2_WARDEN_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..et sic evanuit, scuto fracto et spe extinguita.
SS2_WARDEN_PASSIVE_DESC: A buff ward circumdat te quod praebet sociis in eius radio IDK YET IT ISNT WORKING
SS2_WARDEN_PRIMARY_SWORD_DESC: Swing your sword pro X% vulnere cum the 3rd hit stabbing forward pro X% vulnere
SS2_WARDEN_SECONDARY_SHIELD_DESC: Leva scutum tuum ad bloccandum adipiscens X% armaturam, et Y% movement speed decrease. Bloccans an attack intra the first 0.5s of activation parries the attack et empowers tuam proximam peritiam. Tua primary fit a shield bash et jumping dum tenens tuum scutum rolls you instad.
SS2_WARDEN_SHIELD_BASH_DESC: Scutum Percute ante te pro <style=cIsDamage>240% vulnere</style> et <style=cIsUtility>stupefac</style> hostes percussos.
SS2_WARDEN_UTILITY_LEAP_DESC: Spin forward et slice in front repeatedly, infligens <style=cIsDamage>240% vulnere</style> cum each slice.
SS2_WARDEN_SPECIAL_BANNER_DESC: Leap et slam a banner quod slows down enemies, projectiles, grants <style=cIsUtility>X% movement speed</style>, <style=cIsDamage>Y% attack speed</style>, pro yourself et your allies.
